final:
// // This module implements a 8-bit shift register with left and right shift functionality. It has a parallel load feature that allows loading a new 8-bit value into the register. An active-low load signal loads data, an active-low shift-left signal shifts left, and an active-low shift-right signal shifts right. The shift operations are synchronous with the clock signal.
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input load,
    input shift_left,
    input shift_right,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in; // Load new data
    end else if (shift_left) begin
        data_out <= {data_out[6:0], 1'b0}; // Shift left
    end else if (shift_right) begin
        data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]}; // Shift right
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 8-bit shift register with left and right shift functionality. It has a parallel load feature that allows loading a new 8-bit value into the register. An active-low load signal loads data, an active-low shift-left signal shifts left, and an active-low shift-right signal shifts right. The shift operations are synchronous with the clock signal.
